_human_review.notes: Project owner instructed Codex to mark the US Stage B generated/reconciled tests as approved for internal/project benchmarking after manual review on 2026-06-05. This is not legal advice, external counsel review, or procurement-grade legal approval; candidate labels remain separate from locked recall baselines.

_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: US Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

_label_warning_resolution.reason: US Stage B strict tier was rebuilt from deterministic strict-mode engine findings; raw Azure auto-label warnings no longer describe active must_detect labels. Broader statutory coverage remains in ideal_must_detect for gap review.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: US Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after narrowed SA/US Stage B detector precision fixes

must_detect.matched_text: MNPI controls: no selective disclosure under Reg FD; any wall-crossing of analysts requires NDA and legal approval; as an SEC registrant, Rule 10b-5 anti-fraud applies; this agreement does not include a material adverse change clause.

Generic form labels below are illustrative and not personal data: First Name: ________, Last Name: ________; do not email MNPI to earnings@fairharborhb.example; internal note: project tidepool deck to finalize eod.

Ms. Priya Kendall, CPO; email: privacy@fairharborhb.example; Tel: 1-800-555-0147 (public helpline).
PII scope (CCPA/HIPAA/GLBA): info reasonably linkable to a consumer, household, or patient; do not collect SSN—e.g., “SSN: 000-00-0000” is a placeholder only.
MNPI controls: no selective disclosure under Reg FD; any wall-crossing of analysts requires NDA and legal approval; as an SEC registrant, Rule 10b-5 anti-fraud applies; this agreement does not include a material adverse change clause.
Categories processed include PHI for care coordination (e.g., Patient Portal ID PRTL-001102) and limited KYC; Pa ss port: USA 000 000 000 (invalid) may appear on test forms.
Financial identifiers: Custodial ABA routing 123456780 (checksum invalid); Acct: 0034-88  29; Acc t   :  1100—  45  30  2; do not transmit card PANs.
Retention: insider lists and blackout certifications 7 years; GLBA call recordings 5 years; clinical audit logs 6 years under HIPAA; purge scripts run quarterly.
DSAR: submit at https://privacy.fairharborhb.example/dsar?req=access&entity=C-7894561 or email dsar@meridian-analytics.example; postal requests accepted at P.O. Box 1040 (fictional).
Security: device MAC addresses are salted and hashed and we do not store raw MACs; geolocation is truncated to state; access via https://ir.fairharborhb.example/disclosures?ref=regfd.
Onward transfers: subprocessor North Rim Transfer Services, Inc. (fictional) prints statements; transfers outside the U.S. use SCCs; Reg FD carve‑outs for registered offerings are observed.
Controls: Analyst wall‑crossing approvals logged by Mr. Octavio Reyes (CFO), Employee ID FH-EMP-0412; role-only references like “the Analyst” are not treated as PII.
Healthcare context: Provider NPI 1992746021 (invalid check digit) shown in a sandbox for Redwood Clinic (fictional); product “HarborLink” does not ingest EHR image scans.
Identification capture: state DL code VA with sample ID VAX12345 only for testing; no live patient lab results or account balances are included in training datasets.
Generic form labels below are illustrative and not personal data: First Name: ________, Last Name: ________; do not email MNPI to earnings@fairharborhb.example
